articles.title: 羅馬尼亞投資平台開放儲能項目融資給散戶投資者
keyPoints: MetaWealth是羅馬尼亞首個向散戶開放BESS投資的平台，最低門檻€25,000
項目成本€1690萬，預計出售價€2950萬，三年內收回投資
首個100MWh項目預計2026年底完工併網
設備供應商包括中國 Rept Battero (BESS) 和 Kehua (PCS)
羅馬尼亞2025年底僅400MWh裝機，目標2030年底4GWh
烏克蘭與伊朗衝突推動能源安全投資需求
articles.originalContent: The firm is an investment platform targeting retail investors which has primarily been active in real estate but has now moved into BESS. 'We are enabling investors to participate in assets they otherwise wouldn't have access to,' Topolinski said. 'That €25,000 is much less than a typical BESS investment would require.'

articles.title: 塞內加爾最大太陽能儲能項目實現財務 close
keyPoints: Axian實現Kolda太陽能儲能項目€7200萬財務close
總投資額€8200萬，由EAAIF、FMO和DEG提供
項目規模為西非最大太陽能儲能項目
採用25年PPA協議向Senelec售電
目標2026年11月底調試完工
助力塞內加爾2030年可再生能源佔比40%目標
articles.originalContent: Axian began work on the project last year using its own funds, but has now reached financial close on a €72 million financing deal with the Emerging Africa and Asia Infrastructure Fund (EAAIF), the Dutch development bank FMO and DEG, the German development finance institution.

articles.title: Qcells推出美國住宅太陽能租賃平台
keyPoints: Qcells新成立Qcells New Homes部門進軍住宅市場
與建築商合作提供太陽能及儲能系統租賃方案
使用美國喬治亞州製造的太陽能板和電池
租戶無需支付前期費用，不影響房貸批准
月租費固定且低於平均電費
整合備用電源功能支援電網穩定性
articles.originalContent: Solar manufacturer Qcells is expanding into integrated home energy systems with a new division targeting the US residential construction sector. The division, 'Qcells New Homes', will partner with homebuilders to incorporate solar and battery storage into new-build properties.

articles.title: 法國第三座100MW/200MWh儲能項目開工
keyPoints: Harmony Energy在法國北部諾曼第啟動Foriaux BESS建設
項目規模100MW/200MWh，為法國第三座同規模項目
鄰近社區注重景觀整合和生物多樣性保護
法國輔助服務價格高，未來幾年仍可獲利豐厚
前兩個項目Chevire和Oise已出售給瑞士Alpiq
Tesla提供法國最大項目240MW/480MWh儲能設備
articles.originalContent: BESS developer-operator Harmony Energy has started construction on a 100MW/200MWh BESS in France, its third to reach that stage in the country. The firm announced the start of construction on the Foriaux battery energy storage system (BESS) in Eure, Normandy.

articles.title: 德國引領歐洲太陽能拍賣市場
keyPoints: 德國2021-2025年間通過拍賣授予近25GW太陽能容量
佔歐盟太陽能拍賣總量超過20%份額
2025年創記錄25.2GW新太陽能容量通過政府招標獲得
德國是唯一提供光儲混合招標的歐盟國家
混合招標中標項目為太陽能加儲能標配
德國PPA價格趨於下降，政府拍賣提供收入確定性
articles.originalContent: Germany has long been a leader in terms of national auctions, having awarded nearly 25GW of new solar PV capacity through auctions between 2021 and 2025, according to SolarPower Europe. The trade body also notes that Germany accounted for more than 20% of the EU's total solar capacity awarded through auctions in each of the last four years.
